Enterprise Architecture

Production-Grade Terragrunt & Infrastructure Platform

Environments Layer

🧪
dev/eu-central-1 Feature-rich development sandbox with Spot instance optimization.
🛡️
prod/eu-central-1 High-availability production cluster with manual review gates.
🧬
_envcommon/ Shared inheritance layer enforcing 100% DRY module versioning.

Governance & Policy

🛡️
OIDC Keyless Auth Zero long-lived secrets using GitHub Actions trust-based identities.
💰
Infracost Gates Automated drift detection and cost impact analysis per PR.

repo-root/

  • infrastructure-modules/ (Blueprints)
    • network/
      • vpc/
    • compute/
      • eks/
    • data/
      • s3/
  • infrastructure-live/ (Deliverables)
    • _envcommon/ # The DRY Hub
    • dev/ (Mumbai)
      • network/vpc/ terragrunt.hcl
      • compute/eks/ terragrunt.hcl
    • prod/ (Singapore)
      • data/s3/ terragrunt.hcl
  • infrastructure-bootstrap/

Module Library

⚙️
Categorized Domain Modules grouped by network, compute, and data domains for clarity.
🔌
Wrapped Modules Standardized AWS public modules with enterprise-mandatory tags.

CI/CD Automation

🚀
Parallel Planning High-speed PR feedback loop with multi-env matrix planning.
🏮
Sequential Apply Dependency-aware production apply using Terragrunt 'run-all'.
OK-PLATFORM-ENGINEERING © 2026
